## Verification

## Security/privacy checklist

- [ ] No email bodies, tokens, cookies, credentials, recovery phrases, or private keys are logged.
- [ ] No server-side plaintext mail storage was added.
- [ ] External sends/forwards remain human/policy gated.
- [ ] Prototype/scaffold behavior is clearly labeled.
